gate0.source_grade_rationale: Outlook Business is Indian business financial press (approved list, Jun 2026 expansion block); Grade B as a secondary aggregator — not a primary newswire or official exchange filing.

materiality_math: Base 72 (major SEBI regulatory capital event, direct primary issuer, India-wide scope, Grade B source) + novelty 13 (0.85 × 15, new_event band) − penalties 0 (new_event, no prior match) + override 5 (DRHP is an official SEBI regulatory filing) = 90/100
routing_reason: Jio Platforms DRHP filing is India's potentially largest-ever IPO — a first-seen, primary-issuer capital and regulatory event with materiality 90, well above the 70-point PROMOTE threshold.

sources.claim_supported: Jio Platforms filed DRHP with SEBI for a fresh issue of up to 27 crore shares (~Rs 37,700 crore); Rs 27,500 crore earmarked for debt repayment; Reliance Industries 66.43% pre-IPO; AI investment narrative stated as strategic rationale.
